uplink.description: Status report, seat clear (no motion) - upstream Status_1 OFF
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example status frame. byte3=30 -> battery 3.0 V, byte4=0 -> motion clear, byte5=1 -> status2 true. expected.data authored per AUTHORING.md (occupancy/PIR -> action.motion.detected).
Synthetic occupied frame (byte4=1). Oracle-confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js: Status_1 ON. expected.data authored: action.motion.detected = true.

uplink.description: Status report, occupied with low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic low-battery frame. byte3=158 (0x80|30): high bit -> lowBattery true, low 7 bits -> battery 3.0 V. Oracle-confirmed: upstream renders '3(low battery)'.
Upstream TTN example. reportType byte2=0x00 is a SW/HW version + datecode frame; carries no measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Configure report response on fPort 7 (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example config response. Config traffic lives on fPort 7 and carries no measurement -> error.
